trust.h: The token is backed by real work, not by a sale round.
trust.lede: We never raise from retail on a token sale. Every $FLOW in circulation is paid in by clients for real delivered work and routed to the people who do the job. The liquidity pool is a sink, not a faucet — it only grows, deal by deal.
trust.flow.title: Money flow · one order
trust.flow.drip: 1 % of deposit → LP on day zero
trust.sink.title: Three sources fill the pool
trust.sink.lede: Liquidity grows with usage. The pool receives deposits from three independent streams and never issues tokens back to the protocol treasury.
trust.sink.a_p: Every active job locks its full budget in escrow for 14 days. The more jobs in flight, the deeper the floor.
trust.sink.b_p: Each completed order sends 20 % of the principal straight to the LP. This replaces the legacy 1 % platform fee — the protocol's take is now the pool's gain.
trust.sink.c_p: 1 % of every new deposit goes to the LP on day zero, before execution even starts. A constant top-up, independent of delivery speed.
trust.checklist.title: Hard guarantees
trust.checklist.no_sale: No public token sale — protocol revenue is the only entry point.
trust.checklist.no_team_unlock: No team or investor unlocks inside the first 12 months.
trust.checklist.no_admin_mint: Admin cannot mint — fixed supply at 1,000,000,000, verifiable on-chain.
trust.checklist.op_vesting: Operator payout vests 2 % / day × 14 + 72 % on day 15 — grab-and-run is contractually blocked.
trust.disclaimer: Pre-launch. Numbers on this page are illustrative — real on-chain parameters are locked in the whitepaper and in the deployed contracts at TGE. Not a security, not an investment solicitation, and not available in restricted jurisdictions.
